   "reasoning": "I'll do anything that keeps me in school and reduces the financial burden on my family. Funding boosts will at least keep some teachers on board, incentive bonuses are a must, and scholarships will directly help me. Reallocating resources is a good idea, but let's not hire more staff – it's not like they'll stay. Counseling programs are a nice-to-have but not a priority for me. And please, no attendance mandates – that just causes more stress.",
   "confidence": 0.85
}
